channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: State AGs Seek Temporary Restraining Order To Pause Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery Merger - Deadline
item.description:
1. State AGs Seek Temporary Restraining Order To Pause Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery Merger  Deadline
  2. AGs sue to block Warner Bros., Paramount merger  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  3. Paramount still plans to close WBD merger by end of September despite lawsuit  CNBC
  4. U.S. to reinstate Hormuz blockade. And, states sue over Paramount-Warner deal  NPR
  5. US state officials fear Paramount-Warner deal will squeeze local movie theaters  Reuters

item.title: ‘Too cute by half’: Senators brush off Trump’s suggestions for honoring Graham - Politico
item.description:
1. ‘Too cute by half’: Senators brush off Trump’s suggestions for honoring Graham  Politico
  2. Trump calls for Congress to pass Clarity Act crypto bill to honor Lindsey Graham  CNBC
  3. Trump urges Senate to pass industry-friendly crypto bill ‘in honor of’ Graham  The Washington Post
  4. Bitcoin’s ‘Ultimate Catalyst’ Predicted To Spark A $10 Trillion ‘FOMO’ Price Boom  Forbes
  5. Crypto bill faces make-or-break moment ahead of August recess  The Hill

item.title: Tyler Herro wants to 'move on' from Bam Adebayo altercation - ESPN
item.description:
1. Tyler Herro wants to 'move on' from Bam Adebayo altercation  ESPN
  2. Udonis Haslem and Draymond Green are going at it after the Bam Adebayo-Tyler Herro fight in Las Vegas  Yahoo Sports
  3. The Bounce: Tyler Herro, Bam Adebayo add punch to NBA offseason  The New York Times
  4. Herro’s decision after Adebayo confrontation, and the fan in middle responds  Miami Herald
  5. Tyler Herro breaks silence on Bam Adebayo fight as new details emerge  New York Post
